content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/prisma/schema.prisma:1	generator client {2	  provider = "prisma-client-js"3	}4	5	datasource db {6	  provider = "sqlite"7	  url      = "file:./dev.db"8	}9	10	model User {11	  id            String    @id @default(cuid())12	  name          String?13	  email         String?   @unique14	  password      String?15	  role          String    @default("CUSTOMER")16	  orders        Order[]17	  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())18	  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt19	}20	21	model Restaurant {22	  id          String     @id @default(cuid())23	  name        String24	  description String?25	  address     String26	  ownerId     String27	  menuItems   MenuItem[]28	  orders      Order[]29	  createdAt   DateTime   @default(now())30	  updatedAt   DateTime   @updatedAt31	}32	33	model MenuItem {34	  id           String      @id @default(cuid())35	  name         String36	  description  String?37	  price        Float38	  restaurantId String39	  restaurant   Restaurant  @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])40	  orderItems   OrderItem[]41	  createdAt    DateTime    @default(now())42	  updatedAt    DateTime    @updatedAt43	}44	45	model Order {46	  id           String      @id @default(cuid())47	  userId       String48	  user         User        @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])49	  restaurantId String50	  restaurant   Restaurant  @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])51	  items        OrderItem[]52	  total        Float53	  status       String      @default("PENDING")54	  createdAt    DateTime    @default(now())55	  updatedAt    DateTime    @updatedAt56	}57	58	model OrderItem {59	  id         String   @id @default(cuid())60	  orderId    String61	  order      Order    @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])62	  menuItemId String63	  menuItem   MenuItem @relation(fields: [menuItemId], references: [id])64	  quantity   Int65	  price      Float66	}
